query:
-- Check current vlogger_inquiries columns first
DESCRIBE `vlogger_inquiries`;
stdout:
Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
id	int	NO	PRI	NULL	auto_increment
creatorName	varchar(255)	NO		NULL	
platform	varchar(64)	NO		NULL	
channelUrl	text	YES		NULL	
contactEmail	varchar(320)	YES		NULL	
status	enum('Pending','Sent','Responded','Archived')	NO		Pending	
deadlineDays	enum('7','14','21')	NO		14	
deadlineAt	timestamp	YES		NULL	
lastTemplateUsed	varchar(128)	YES		NULL	
notes	text	YES		NULL	
createdAt	timestamp	NO		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	
updatedAt	timestamp	NO		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	DEFAULT_GENERATED on update CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
